history.note: Officer-side attendance tools — manual marking, inline row actions, and a live-updating searchable roster.
highlights: Officers with manage_attendance can now mark students present without a face scan — FAB "Add attendance" plus a searchable picker that hits POST /api/attendance/manual with full governance context.
Inline per-row "Mark present" and "Sign out" actions directly on the event monitor.
Searchable roster with name, mono student ID, time-in / time-out pills, status-tinted avatar, and status chip — replaces the old "Student #142" rows.
Filter pills — All · Present · Late · Absent — with mono count badges.
Smart-poll on attendees so check-ins appear without a manual refresh.
Backend wiring fix: GovUserSummary.studentProfileId is now the FK that actually matches attendances.student_id, so officer dashboards line up with the underlying records.

history.note: Sharper attendance UX and a quieter, more reliable notification path.
highlights: Alarm-style event notifications — rings on the alarm volume stream, bypasses silent and Focus modes.
Clearer CHECK IN / SIGN OUT banner above the scan capture button; duplicate check-ins are blocked.
Labeled CHECK-IN TIME / CHECK-OUT TIME rows in the result sheet, with a SIGN-OUT OPENS hint and a total-time pill.
Real-time auto-refresh on profile, notifications, events, sanctions, and students (30–60s while foregrounded; pauses in background).
Schoolit Users search plus Program / Year / Status / Face-enrolled filter chips.
Login redesign — centered hero, halo, staggered entrance.
Release APKs build cleanly again; per-ABI splits land at ~38–45 MB each instead of one ~105 MB fat APK.

history.note: Latest pilot-merge build. CI-driven build numbering, faster release cadence.
Pilot stable. Assistant Fast/Think mode, inline chart rendering, deployment hardening.
Assistant chat screen and SSE client for the Flutter app.
Bulk student import refresh, role assignment edge-cases.
Geofence accuracy improvements, sign-out grace windows.
Face re-enrollment flow, manual attendance audit trail.
First pilot-merge build with governance workspace.
